# zphysics Vendoring

Source: https://github.com/zig-gamedev/zig-gamedev/tree/main/libs/zphysics
Zig package hash: zphysics-0.2.0-dev-nZDEANvfQgD04nOPqL9KMokfgjzs_wPtHpoLscZScaOa
Vendored from: zig-pkg/zphysics-0.2.0-dev-nZDEANvfQgD04nOPqL9KMokfgjzs_wPtHpoLscZScaOa

friendly-engine vendors zphysics because `build.zig.zon` points the
`zphysics` dependency at `third_party/zphysics`.

To refresh this tree, use the `vendor-zphysics` contributor skill in
`.agents/skills/vendor-zphysics`.
